threat_model: A signed approval intake contract could be mistaken for real signed authorization if intake flags, required witness values, signature fields, source template fields, or runtime authority fields permit collection, approval acceptance, signature verification, runtime authorization gate satisfaction, or activation. The mitigation is a schema-backed local-only intake with AwaitingEvidence, AwaitingSignedApproval, hard false approval/signature/authority fields, explicit generic continuation rejection binding, and remaining gates for a real signed approval witness and separate activation.

required_checks.check: authority boundary check proves the intake keeps runtime promotion, execution, dispatch, runtime replanning, success claims, terminal closure, and runtime execution false

approval-collection drift check proves the intake cannot set approval acceptance, signed approval witness collection, operator approval, signed approval, decision acceptance, runtime authorization gate satisfaction, or runtime activation allowance
intake integrity check proves the checked-in fixture matches the deterministic produced intake and validates against the schema
signature-drift check proves signature presence, signature verification, required witness values, and generic-continuation-derived values remain rejected until real signed evidence exists

findings.mitigation: The schema and validator hard-deny intake_accepted_as_approval, signed_approval_witness_collected, operator_response_recorded, operator_approval_collected, signed_approval_present, decision_value_present, decision_value_accepted, signature_present, signature_verified, runtime_authorization_gate_satisfied, runtime_activation_allowed, runtime_promotion_authorized, execution_allowed, dispatch_allowed, runtime_replanning_enabled, success_claim_allowed, terminal_closure, and runtime execution fields.

The intake validator rejects signature_present, signature_verified, required witness value presence, required witness verification, generic-continuation-derived values, and source template drift until a separate real signed approval witness path is added.

mitigations: keep the signed approval intake local, deterministic, and read-only
hard-deny all runtime promotion, execution, dispatch, runtime replanning, success, terminal closure, activation, and runtime execution fields in the schema
hard-deny signature presence, signature verification, decision acceptance, and signed approval collection
bind the intake to the deterministic approval witness template id/hash and generic continuation rejection witness
record real signed approval and separate runtime activation as remaining gates before activation
